inputs.label: Load Current
inputs.businessContext: The full load current drawn by the equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The full load current drawn by the equipment.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der volle Laststrom, der vom Gerät aufgenommen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Courant de pleine charge absorbé par l'équipement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Corriente nominal a plena carga del equipo.

inputs.label: Cable Length (one-way)
inputs.businessContext: One-way distance between power source and load.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-way distance between power source and load.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç kaynağı ile yük arasındaki tek yön mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einfache Entfernung zwischen Stromquelle und Last.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance aller simple entre la source d'alimentation et la charge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de ida entre la fuente de alimentación y la carga.
Tensión nominal de la fuente de alimentación.

inputs.label: Max Voltage Drop
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable voltage drop as percentage of supply voltage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable voltage drop as percentage of supply voltage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besleme geriliminin yüzdesi olarak izin verilen maksimum gerilim düşümü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässiger Spannungsabfall in Prozent der Versorgungsspannung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage maximal de chute de tension autorisé par rapport à la tension d'alimentation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caída de tensión máxima permitida como porcentaje de la tensión de alimentación.

inputs.label: Conductor Resistivity
inputs.businessContext: Resistivity of conductor material at operating temperature (e.g., copper: 0.0172, aluminum: 0.0282).

businessContext_i18n.en: Resistivity of conductor material at operating temperature (e.g., copper: 0.0172, aluminum: 0.0282).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletken malzemesinin çalışma sıcaklığındaki direnci (örneğin bakır: 0,0172, alüminyum: 0,0282).
businessContext_i18n.de: Widerstand des Leitermaterials bei Betriebstemperatur (z. B. Kupfer: 0,0172, Aluminium: 0,0282).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistivité du matériau conducteur à la température de fonctionnement (ex. cuivre : 0,0172, aluminium : 0,0282).
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistividad del material conductor a temperatura de operación (ej., cobre: 0.0172, aluminio: 0.0282).

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design margin to account for future load increases or uncertainties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design margin to account for future load increases or uncertainties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki yük artışları veya belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için tasarım marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auslegungsreserve für zukünftige Laststeigerungen oder Unsicherheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge de conception pour tenir compte des augmentations de charge futures ou des incertitudes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de diseño para considerar futuros aumentos de carga o incertidumbres.

inputs.label: Temperature Factor
inputs.businessContext: Correction factor for ambient temperature (1.0 for standard conditions).

businessContext_i18n.en: Correction factor for ambient temperature (1.0 for standard conditions).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortam sıcaklığı için düzeltme faktörü (standart koşullar için 1,0).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de correction pour la température ambiante (1,0 pour des conditions standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de corrección por temperatura ambiente (1.0 para condiciones estándar).

formulas.minCableArea: (2 * cableLength * loadCurrent * resistivity * safetyFactor * ambientTempFactor) / voltageDropVolts

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
